windows.command: if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\relational-graph-server\config\" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\relational-graph-server\config\" && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\common.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\relational-graph-server\config\" /Y && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\mcp-servers\relational-graph-server.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\relational-graph-server\config\" /Y

if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\context-server\config\" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\context-server\config\" && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\common.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\context-server\config\" /Y && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\mcp-servers\context-server.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\context-server\config\" /Y

if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\data-server\config\" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\data-server\config\" && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\common.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\data-server\config\" /Y && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\mcp-servers\data-server.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\data-server\config\" /Y

if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\rostering-server\config\" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\rostering-server\config\" && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\common.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\rostering-server\config\" /Y && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\mcp-servers\rostering-server.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\mcp-servers\rostering-server\config\" /Y

if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\agents\rostering\config\" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\agents\rostering\config\" && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\common.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\agents\rostering\config\" /Y && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\agents\rostering-agent.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\agents\rostering\config\" /Y

if not exist "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\services\management-service\config\" mkdir "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\services\management-service\config\" && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\common.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\services\management-service\config\" /Y && copy "${workspaceFolder}\config\management-service.yml" "${workspaceFolder}\cmd\services\management-service\config\" /Y
